features.name: wire with packed struct aggregate type
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration whose type is a packed struct (aggregate bundle), analogous to a FIRRTL bundle that would be split into scalar fields during type lowering

features.name: hierarchical reference to named wire declaration
features.description: Code should include a wire declaration with a user-visible name referenced via a hierarchical path from another scope, mirroring inner_sym usage in FIRRTL that requires the symbol to survive lowering passes

features.name: aggregate wire split into scalar fields under hierarchical reference
features.description: Code should include a wire of struct type that is also the target of a hierarchical reference, creating a situation where type flattening into scalar wires conflicts with the need to preserve the original symbol name

features.name: reg with aggregate type and symbolic name
features.description: Code should include a register declared with an aggregate (struct) type alongside an explicit instance name, mirroring FIRRTL RegOp with inner_sym where type lowering must decide how to preserve the register's identity across field splitting
